_comment: All tunable parameters of the pipeline, in one place. Every value here is a documented choice, not derived automatically.

period._note: Analysis grid. Values with a reference_year outside this range are kept in the long table but excluded from the plant x year grid.

outlier_rule._note: Per-plant robust rule. A candidate is flagged an outlier iff the plant has >= min_values_per_plant candidates AND (value > ratio_high * plant_median OR value < plant_median / ratio_low_divisor) AND abs(value - plant_median) > abs_gap_min. The abs_gap floor prevents flagging normal swings at small plants; its side effect is that wrong values on small plants must be caught by the manual blocklist instead.

_snippet_key_note: Number of leading characters used to detect the same citation reused across plants (cross-plant duplicate rule).

consolidation._note: One value per (plant, year) cell. Archived first (2+ sources agreeing wins, else archived priority order from source_registry). Then press, then curated additions, then Wikipedia fill the still-empty cells. Non-archived sources never override an archived value.
